prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild scene, Celestia Vale in a travel dress and Ren Silverbrook in a formal cloak; Celestia spreads a large, weathered quest map across the wooden guild counter, looking toward Ren for guidance. Warm tavern lighting, cinematic medium shot, anime style, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild shot; Ren Silverbrook leans in and places his heavy brass guild seal firmly onto the corner of the map to hold it flat, while Celestia Vale traces a route on the parchment with her finger, both nodding in mutual agreement. Consistent tavern background, anime art style, no text, no watermark.
